name: SiteMinder Hotel Distribution API
what_it_does: SiteMinder REST API for hotel channel management and distribution platform. Enables AI agents to manage rate and availability updates across OTAs (Booking.com, Expedia, Airbnb), synchronize reservations, manage the hotel booking engine, and integrate distribution data with PMS systems. SiteMinder is the leading hotel channel manager used by 35,000+ properties globally.
use_cases: Updating room rates and availability across OTA channels from revenue management agents
Receiving and managing reservations from multiple OTAs from reservation management agents
Optimizing rate strategy across channels from revenue optimization agents
Integrating SiteMinder with PMS systems from property management integration agents
not_for: Non-hotel businesses without OTA distribution requirements
Full PMS functionality without channel management focus
Direct booking only without multi-channel distribution
best_when: A hotel wanting AI agents to automate rate management across OTAs, synchronize availability, and optimize channel distribution strategy in real-time.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Guest reservation data from OTAs is subject to OTA data sharing agreements. Rate manipulation must comply with rate parity agreements with OTA partners.

auth.notes: SiteMinder uses API key or OAuth 2.0 depending on integration type. Partner integrations use OAuth with per-property authorization. Connectivity API for PMS vendors has different auth model.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; developer sandbox available
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-property subscription; tech partner program for PMS/RMS vendors
pricing.notes: Australian company (Sydney). ASX-listed (SDR). Market leader in hotel channel management. Tech partner certification for connectivity providers.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key/OAuth app; high volume supported for channel updates

known_agent_gotchas: No public MCP server — REST API with OAuth or API key
Rate parity agreements with OTAs — automated rate changes must respect parity obligations
Per-property authorization required for partner apps
Australian company — AU data residency primary; GDPR compliance for EU properties
OTA connectivity is real-time bidirectional — inventory updates must be immediate and accurate
Tech partner certification required for commercial distribution partnerships
agent_readiness.security_notes: Guest reservation data from OTAs. PCI-DSS, GDPR, SOC2. Australian company. OAuth2 per-property. Rate parity compliance obligations.

security_score_components.security_notes: Guest OTA data. PCI-DSS, GDPR, SOC2. Australian company. OAuth2 per-property.
